title: Restaurant Management Web App
description: Restaurant website featuring a dynamic menu carousel and customer contact system.
highlights: Implemented a card carousel using Fetch API to preview restaurant menu items.
Built a contact form to enable direct communication with customers.
Designed a responsive and modern landing page experience.

title: Aniverse
description: Movie streaming platform landing page focused on content discovery and engagement.
highlights: Created an engaging movie streaming landing page.
Built a dynamic movie carousel powered by Fetch API.
Improved browsing experience and user engagement.

title: MFM Church Website
description: Modern church website with dynamic events, navigation, and communication features.
highlights: Built a modern React landing page for improved visitor experience.
Added a dynamic event carousel using Fetch API.
Implemented React Router navigation for smooth page transitions.
Created Prayer Request and Contact forms for member communication.
